payload.answer: Could you clarify who 'he' refers to?

Double-check the JSON structure. Make sure arrays are properly formatted, entities have name, type, role (role is required in entities). For "he", name could be "he", type "pronoun", role "subject". For "the other one", name "other one", type "object" or "pronoun", role "object".
